THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREEDING, JOHN GARZA, ARMONDO GARZA, ARMANDO SUED AS ARMONDO THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 417 GOUGH STREET #121 SAN FRACNISCO, CA. $145.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $145.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-08-1998, LEASE FORFEITED, $145.00 TO BE PAID BEFORE END OF DAY ON 9/1/98. PLTF. WAIVES ALL BACK RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES THROUGH 9/8/98. NO FURTHER STAYS. PERSONAL PROPERTY ABANDONED IF NOT TAKEN BY DEFT. MUTUAL RELEASE. WAIVER OF RIGHTS UNDER CIVIL CODE 1542. IF DEFT. COMPLIES CASE TO BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE.
